artworks.title: The Announcing
artworks.description: This piece emerged from a season of deep worship. The colors were chosen to reflect the tension between divine glory and human fragility — a reminder that Christ meets us in our brokenness.

artworks.title: Throne Room
artworks.description: A vision of heavenly worship. Built in Blender over three weeks, every light ray was placed intentionally to guide the eye upward toward the source of all light.
